clues.clue: Dustin Hoffman played a graduate student terrorized by a sadistic dentist in this thriller — Ben Kingsley won his Oscar for 'Gandhi' the same year this film was NOT released; he won it in 1983 for a film set in this year: 1982. Actually: John Barry won an Oscar for 'Dances with Wolves' in this year that WALL·E was released... Re-checking: the Spaghetti Western year is 1965; the long-running sci-fi 'Dr Who' first aired in this year.
clues.fit_justification: Source question literally asks 'Which long running sci-fi program was first aired in November 1963?' and source answer is 'Dr Who'; source answer '1963' is implied by the question text. NOTE: source answer is 'Dr Who' not '1963' — this fact does not fit the year-answer theme. REJECT.
